## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings (`make dev`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`bash tests/integration_lifecycle.sh`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`cargo fmt --all` and `zig fmt zig/src/`)
- [ ] New functionality includes tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
